title: Fingerprints and other identification data
doc_html:
§1385.  Fingerprints and other identification data

The employees of the division shall take fingerprints and such other identification data as is prescribed by the department of all persons taken into custody by them for offenses other than those arising solely out of violations of fish, game, conservation, or traffic laws.
doc_text:
§1385.  Fingerprints and other identification data
The employees of the division shall take fingerprints and such other identification data as is prescribed by the department of all persons taken into custody by them for offenses other than those arising solely out of violations of fish, game, conservation, or traffic laws.
